preCompact.bash: command -v bd >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; bd list --status in_progress --json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.[].id' 2>/dev/null | while read id; do [ -n "$id" ] && bd update "$id" --append-notes "INTERRUPTED: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"; done; exit 0
preCompact.powershell: if (-not (Get-Command bd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { exit 0 }; $ids = bd list --status in_progress --json 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty id; foreach ($id in $ids) { if ($id) { bd update $id --append-notes "INTERRUPTED: $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ')" } }; exit 0

preCompact.bash:
dir=".agents/issues/in_progress"; [ -d "$dir" ] || exit 0; ts=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ); for f in "$dir"/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; if grep -q "^## Notes" "$f"; then sed -i "/^## Notes/a INTERRUPTED: $ts" "$f"; else printf "
## Notes
INTERRUPTED: %s
" "$ts" >> "$f"; fi; done; exit 0
preCompact.powershell: $dir = '.agents/issues/in_progress'; if (-not (Test-Path $dir)) { exit 0 }; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ'; Get-ChildItem "$dir/*.md" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $content = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw; if ($content -match '(?m)^## Notes') { $content = $content -replace '(?m)(^## Notes)', "`$1`nINTERRUPTED: $ts" } else { $content += "`n## Notes`nINTERRUPTED: $ts`n" }; Set-Content $_.FullName $content }; exit 0

sessionEnd.bash: git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; dirty=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); unpushed=$(git log @{u}..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$dirty" ] || [ -n "$unpushed" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: git is not clean. Uncommitted changes: ${dirty:-none}. Unpushed commits: ${unpushed:-none}. Run git push before ending session." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
sessionEnd.powershell: try { git rev-parse --git-dir 2>$null | Out-Null } catch { exit 0 }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 0 }; $dirty = git status --porcelain 2>$null; $unpushed = git log '@{u}..HEAD' --oneline 2>$null; if ($dirty -or $unpushed) { Write-Error "BLOCKED: git is not clean. Uncommitted: $($dirty -join ', '). Unpushed: $($unpushed -join ', '). Run git push before ending session."; exit 2 }; exit 0
